description:
Carry the interface model through the later compiler pipeline. Replace `DirectCallee::Named`, `SelectedCallee::Named`, and `NamedFunctionRef` with interface-backed `FunctionId` resolution, so body lowering, semantic facts, artifact planning, backend/native lowering, and related tests no longer carry unresolved textual callable placeholders.

Audit protocol handling in the same pass: protocols should ride the same callable/interface substrate, and any remaining protocol-specific name specialness that exists only because callables were not first-class should be removed rather than papered over.

Signal: compiler2 later tiers are function-identity-based end to end, and downstream jobs no longer need named-callable fallback branches.
title: Compiler2 callable resolution cutover: delete Named callees/fnrefs and resolve through ModuleInterface
